tools.rotateCustom.successMessage.en: Rotation completed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.rotateCustom.successMessage.zh: 旋转完成！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.addBlankPage.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to add blank pages.
tools.addBlankPage.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以添加空白页。

tools.addBlankPage.positionHint.en: Enter 0 to insert at the beginning, or {total} to insert at the end.
tools.addBlankPage.positionHint.zh: 输入 0 在开头插入，或输入 {total} 在末尾插入。

tools.addBlankPage.successMessage.en: Blank pages added successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.addBlankPage.successMessage.zh: 空白页添加成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.reversePages.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to reverse page order.
tools.reversePages.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以反转页面顺序。

tools.reversePages.infoDescription.en: This will reverse the order of all pages in your PDF. The last page will become the first, and so on.
tools.reversePages.infoDescription.zh: 这将反转PDF中所有页面的顺序。最后一页将变成第一页，依此类推。

tools.reversePages.successMessage.en: Page order reversed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.reversePages.successMessage.zh: 页面顺序反转成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.alternateMerge.uploadDescription.en: Upload two or more PDF files to interleave their pages alternately.
tools.alternateMerge.uploadDescription.zh: 上传两个或更多PDF文件以交替合并页面。

tools.alternateMerge.reorderHint.en: Drag and drop to reorder files. Pages will be interleaved in the order shown (1st page from file 1, 1st page from file 2, 2nd page from file 1, etc.).
tools.alternateMerge.reorderHint.zh: 拖放以重新排序文件。页面将按显示顺序交替合并（文件1的第1页，文件2的第1页，文件1的第2页，依此类推）。

tools.alternateMerge.reverseSecondHint.en: Enable this for back-to-front scanned documents
tools.alternateMerge.reverseSecondHint.zh: 适用于从后往前扫描的文档

tools.alternateMerge.howItWorksDescripti.en: Pages are interleaved alternately: Page 1 from File 1, Page 1 from File 2, Page 2 from File 1, Page 2 from File 2, and so on. If documents have different page counts, extra pages are appended at the end.
tools.alternateMerge.howItWorksDescripti.zh: 页面交替合并：文件1的第1页，文件2的第1页，文件1的第2页，文件2的第2页，依此类推。如果文档页数不同，多余的页面将附加在末尾。

tools.alternateMerge.successMessage.en: PDFs interleaved successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.alternateMerge.successMessage.zh: PDF交替合并成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.combineSinglePage.addSeparator.zh: 在页面之间添加分隔线

tools.combineSinglePage.previewInfo.en: {pages} pages will be combined into 1 continuous {orientation} page.
tools.combineSinglePage.previewInfo.zh: {pages} 页将合并为 1 个连续的{orientation}页面。

tools.combineSinglePage.successMessage.en: Pages combined successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.combineSinglePage.successMessage.zh: 页面合并成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.addAttachments.pdfUploadDescriptio.en: Select the PDF file to add attachments to.
tools.addAttachments.pdfUploadDescriptio.zh: 选择要添加附件的PDF文件。

tools.addAttachments.attachmentsUploadDe.en: Select files to embed in the PDF. Any file type is supported.
tools.addAttachments.attachmentsUploadDe.zh: 选择要嵌入PDF的文件。支持任何文件类型。

tools.addAttachments.pageRangeHint.en: Specify which pages to attach files to.
tools.addAttachments.pageRangeHint.zh: 指定要附加文件的页面。

tools.addAttachments.successMessage.en: Attachments added successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.addAttachments.successMessage.zh: 附件添加成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.editAttachments.uploadDescription.en: Select a PDF file to view and manage its attachments.
tools.editAttachments.uploadDescription.zh: 选择PDF文件以查看和管理其附件。

tools.editAttachments.noAttachments.en: No attachments found in this PDF file.

tools.editAttachments.selectedCount.zh: 已选择 {count} 个附件待移除

tools.editAttachments.selectAtLeastOne.en: Please select at least one attachment to remove.
tools.editAttachments.selectAtLeastOne.zh: 请至少选择一个附件进行移除。

tools.editAttachments.successMessage.en: Attachments removed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.editAttachments.successMessage.zh: 附件移除成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.comparePdfs.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop or click to browse

tools.comparePdfs.diffView.zh: 差异视图（红色区域显示变化）

tools.comparePdfs.successMessage.en: Comparison complete! Use the view modes and page navigation to explore differences.
tools.comparePdfs.successMessage.zh: 比较完成！使用查看模式和页面导航来探索差异。

tools.pdfToZip.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files to package.
tools.pdfToZip.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行打包。
